properties.displayName: Microsoft Purview accounts should disable public network access
properties.description: Disabling public network access improves security by ensuring that Microsoft Purview accounts are not exposed on the public internet and can only be reached from a private endpoint. Microsoft's built-in policy only audits for an approved private endpoint connection; this custom definition denies on the publicNetworkAccess field for stronger enforcement. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/purview-private-link.

metadata.description: Enable or disable the execution of the policy
